Description: Ultra South Africa is Africa's largest electronic music festival and is part of Ultra Music Festival's worldwide expansion which has now spread to twenty countries.[1][2] Ultra South Africa is a single day event taking place in two cities (Johannesburg and Cape Town). Having debuted in 2014, Ultra South Africa is the third longest standing world editions of the festival behind Ultra Europe and Ultra Korea.[3] Ultra South Africa is a strictly 18 and over event.

Description:
GIGEVATE LAUNCH PARTY: WELCOME TO THE FUTURE OF ELECTRONIC MUSIC

Step into the next chapter of electronic music as we celebrate the official launch of Gigevate. This is the platform built for the culture, created for the artists, the organisers and the fans who keep the scene alive.

Gigevate connects the entire ecosystem in one trusted space. Secure bookings, seamless payments, transparent communication and experience tracking that keeps you in control. It is time to launch the future, together.

Join us for an electrifying night filled with connection, energy and the heartbeat of our community.

Description: German DJ and producer Klangkuenstler is one of the leading names in the contemporary techno scene. His sound weaves old-school and modern tencho into a raw, intense whole; delivered with his signature lighting designs and grand LED installations. Expect an immersive journey through the history of techno, drawing from an extensive collection of tracks from the late 90s to the mid 10s.

Description:
(A-Z)
CARISTA
D’MONK (LIVE)
ERROL
JADALAREIGN
SAMMSEED
WRONGSAL
+ SPECIAL GUEST

Two of Europe’s finest contemporary black-owned musical platforms — CARISTA’s United Identities (NL) and ERROL’s Touching Bass (UK) — link up for the first time at ADE 2024. Expect a full-blooded joyride equal parts gritty, unpredictable and soulful as the stars align at Radio Radio.

Beyond the founders, the roll call remains crazily good; from the sophisticated heat of NYC’s JADALAREIGN and Clone Records affiliate WRONGSAL to Touching Bass disciple SAMMSEED being joined by a much-loved, London-via-Amsterdam special guest (TBA) and longtime friend, as she tops off an impressive 2024.

Fresh from the announcement of ‘Shine’ — his must-listen, Rush Hour and Phonica Records-approved debut EP via Touching Bass — D'MONK rounds off the bill with a finely-tuned hybrid live performance that falls somewhere between the groove and duttiness of electro, soulful house, Detroit-influenced beatdown and UK sounds.


There's nowhere better to be.

Description: Close out your ADE with a transformative experience hosted by HABITAT. Established by Mind Against, HABITAT shares the belief same to dedicate itself to pioneering uncharted territories. The Italian duo is our long time friend with their Audio Obscura first show dating back to 2013.  This event features performances by Mind Against, WhoMadeWho (hybrid DJ set), Mathame, Mano Le Tough, Dyzen b2b Sideral and Eli Verveine. Immerse yourself in the innovative sounds and visionary performances that define the HABITAT ethos.  Join us as we dance and explore the intersection of music, art, and technology.

Description: Ciranda returns to its home base Doka during ADE 2024, featuring an all-Amsterdam lineup with special guest Antal and host Mendel, promising an intimate evening of diverse musical styles.
AdditionalInformation:
Antal & Mendel

Still filled with joy from our summer dance, we're now setting our sights on a cosy autumn. To say we're looking forward to our next Ciranda would be an understatement. We're returning to our dear home base Doka on Sunday October 20th, during Amsterdam Dance Event. We hope it’s a chance for our friends from abroad to join us this time for our beloved Sunday dance, on the final day of ADE. 

And what would be more fitting than an all-Amsterdam lineup for this evening? This edition's special guest is Antal, a true cornerstone of the Amsterdam musical landscape and has influenced Ciranda in many ways. Their broad interests and ability to mix various musical styles and moods are key ingredients of the Sunday gatherings. It will be special to have them play in this intimate setting at Ciranda, alongside our host Mendel. Two generations of Amsterdam’s eclectic selectors, who will surely take us on a beautiful flight.

Description: Join us on October 19th for Ben Hemsley's & friends boatparty!  With tracks signed to labels like his own bebé recordings and Armada Music, it’s no surprise he won the Best Producer category in the DJ Mag, Best of British awards. Add to that a new BBC 1 Radio Residency and an Ibiza residency for his bebé label at Ibiza rocks! Ben is one of the biggest ticket sellers in the UK and is quickly solidifying his name in the dance music world while putting a new spin on trance!  Get on board with Ben and his crew including:  Maruwa Eva Vriday Kyle Starkey Superstrings  Doors open 23:00 Start sailing 23:30, be on time! End 05:00 ( no stops hafway)

VERKNIPT FESTIVAL 2025 - SPECIAL 10TH EDITION!

On 7 & 8 June, 2025, we will be returning to our beloved Strijkviertel for the 10th edition of our annual festival. Sun or rain, we can’t wait to be raving again with all of you!

PS. The Monday after Verknipt Festival 2025 is a national holiday (Pinksteren/Pentecost), so everyone has a day off! That means you can rave with us all weekend and rest on Monday.

Ihr wollt ein Teil des größten WE ARE ONE Events aller Zeiten werden? Am 28.05.2025 öffnet der Schlachthof Wiesbaden wieder seine Türen für eine unvergessliche Festival-Edition!

Mehr Infos & das gesamte Line-Up findet ihr auf Instagram @weareone_kollektiv

Der Schlachthof ist ein Ort, an dem die Grenzen anderer respektiert werden. Jede*r soll sich hier wohlfühlen - ohne Angst vor Diskriminierungen oder Übergriffen jeglicher Art haben zu müssen. Manchmal überschreiten Gäste die Grenzen anderer. Das wollen wir nicht tolerieren. Wenn ihr ein solches Verhalten bemerkt, wendet euch bitte direkt an das durch Westen erkenntliche Awareness-Team. Alternativ könnt ihr euch jederzeit an das Einlass- & Sicherheitspersonal wenden.

Einlass ab 18 Jahren, nur mit gültigem Lichtbildausweis (Personalausweis & Führerschen). Alle wichtigen Einlassregeln findet ihr auf der Homepage vom Schlachthof Wiesbaden.

A night for the heads, the dancers, and the deep diggers. Ben UFO steps into Shelter with a set that promises to be anything but predictable. Known for his daring, wide-ranging selections and razor-sharp mixing, he weaves together elements of house, techno, UK bass, electro, and broken rhythms with fluidity and finesse. Whether it’s a curveball from the depths of dubstep or a euphoric four-to-the-floor groove, his sets are rich, unpredictable, and always moving.

Joining the bill is Jasmín, bringing her vibrant, bass-heavy sound to the floor.

In the second room, Noord Holland Spoor hosts a triple B2B session from Cule, Lo DS, and Tommy Chikara: expect fast blends and playful turns. Bassie & Bouk Liúw round out the room with selections that go deep, warm, and wide.

On Saturday morning, the CLUB TRAIN will kick off with a powerful sunrise showcase hosted by one of the most influential names in the international techno scene: SPACE 92.

Techno Peak Time / Drive’s best-selling artist of all time, and the mind behind a string of number one hits, SPACE 92 is a trailblazing French producer. His sound identity is a mix of trancey techno, distorted percussion and a touch of acid, in addition to underlying sensitivity and nostalgia. SPACE 92 has released music on the world’s most influential labels: Drumcode, Filth on Acid, Factory 93, Arcane.

Founded in 2025 by SPACE 92, TAKEOFF is a young label that has consistently charted in the Beatport Top 3 since its inception, and is already ranked in the worldwide Techno Label Beatstats Top 20.

For this special ADE showcase, the label will take over one of the CLUB TRAIN stages with a full journey curated by SPACE 92 himself. This will be one of the most anticipated sets of the weekend.

German DJ and producer Klangkuenstler is one of the defining voices of the
modern techno scene. He stands for an uncompromising sound – a powerful
blend of old-school and new-school Techno. His “All Night Long” series has become a signature experience, giving him full
creative control over the night. These 7 to 8-hour sets take dancers on a
journey through the history of the genre, diving deep into Klangkuenstler’s
music collection from the late 1990s to the mid-2010s.
With his brand “Outworld,” Klangkuenstler brings his bold vision of Techno to
life, not just as a label, but also as an event series with an innovative
production concept. Blending futuristic aesthetics with raw, industrial sound,
Outworld transports the crowd into a dystopian, sci-fi-inspired world

UNDRGRND HALLOWEEN SPECIAL

Prepare for a night where the shadows dance and the bassline reigns supreme. Undrgrnd Amsterdam is taking over Club John Doe for a Halloween Special that will keep the spirits moving from dusk till dawn.

This Friday, step into the dark heart of Amsterdam's techno scene. We're bringing you a lineup of true underground masters: Alex Sharp, Vannood, Hinborq, and Aundreja.

Expect a journey through raw, hypnotic techno, hard-edged peaktime energy, and cosmic, deep-pulsing beats. This is more than a party; it's an eight-hour ritual of sound.

Don't miss the most anticipated Halloween event in the city. Secure your spot in the darkness.

- Club John Doe, Amsterdam
- Friday, 31.10 2025
- 11PM - 7AM

CODE 303 x UNDRGRND — Fifth Edition

The journey continues. After four sold-out nights that have defined the sound of the Amsterdam underground, CODE 303 x UNDRGRND returns for its fifth and most anticipated chapter on November 7th.

Prepare for a night defined by the relentless, driving sound of PEAK TIME, the hypnotic squelch of ACID, and the raw power of HARD TECHNO. This is the sound of the underground evolving.

For this edition, we welcome a lineup of both familiar faces and new forces to take control of the floor and guide us through the night.

Lineups:

* MIESØ 23:00 - 00:30
* Alex Sharp 00:30 - 02:00
* CØPTER 02:00 - 03:15
* Gaya Carmeli 03:15 - 04:45
* BRIZZIA 04:45 - 06:00
* MYDOVA 06:00 - 07:00

This is the underground evolving, one night at a time. Join us for a night of connection, intensity, and pure CODE 303 energy.

UNDRGRND AMSTERDAM: DRVN

This is the sound of the future. This is the sound of the underground.

On November 14th, we push the limits with DRVN—a night dedicated to the three pillars of the UNDRGRND sound: MELODIC, PEAKTIME, and DRIVEN TECHNO.

Expect eight hours of relentless, high-impact music from a line-up built to take control:

* ARTE-MAS
* ALEX SHARP
* SAM ROSE
* FLORIDA GUEST TBA

Expect a masterclass in high-octane, immersive sound design that demands your full attention. Lock in the date and prepare to be driven.

Born from an unrenovated apartment building in Friedrichshain, across the river from Treptower Park, Renate has three main dance floors and many smaller rooms to explore. As the sun rises over Amsterdam, The Loft transforms into a temple of light and sound.
Freerange presents Bella, Eliza Rose, and Sam Alfred for a rare sunrise-to-sunset experience 16 floors above the IJ. Expect soulful house grooves, melodic warmth, and euphoric energy framed by one of the most iconic skyline views in Europe.

An intimate atmosphere, pure sound, and the feeling of dancing in the clouds.

After a sold-out run of atmospheric shows, Mees Salomé returns to The Loft for an intimate late-night performance.
Set against the panoramic skyline of Amsterdam, the space becomes a high-rise sanctuary of sound — cinematic, melodic, and deeply immersive.

Expect a sonic journey through warm progressions, euphoric builds, and the refined production quality The Loft is known for.

An unforgettable night for true melodic lovers.

NEW ERA | TILLATEC SESSION
Two portals. One journey.

Our mission for this session is to keep you constantly surrounded by creativity — a shower of art through sound and vision.

Get ready for more than a regular club experience. On the main stage (MAIN PORTAL), we’ll take you on a carefully built-up musical journey — a powerful rise that connects rhythm, movement, and emotion.

Then, step into another dimension — (AQUARIUM PORTAL) our audiovisual room, where sound and visuals merge into a breathtaking live experience. This is where you can slow down, sink in, and let your senses be guided through color and sound.
Let’s splash our brains with art and energy.


Your hype and your calm both matter to us — as you enter our portal, we invite you to explore, feel, and flow.

We’ve invited Herrensauna to take over TILLATEC for the duration of an entire weekend for the 10-year anniversary of the Berlin-based collective, a queer haven for harder-edged techno and hedonism in the German capital. Since 2015, they've grown from an underground sensation to something of a global phenomenon.

In Berlin, the beloved local party Herrensauna, had achieved legendary status . Established in 2015 by DJs Cem Dukkha (CEM) and Nicolas Endlicher (MCMLXXX), Herrensauna provided a consistent refuge for the queer community in Berlin's nightlife scene.

NEST RAVE docks – and provides you with a night below deck with a line-up in a class of its own. On Friday 10 October, we’ll be building our nest together – and invite you to shake the ship with us. No compromises, no going backwards – we’re going full speed ahead and are looking forward to a lot of swell, driven by the thumping bass. Let yourself drift through the night with us – without going overboard! Nest building starts at 11pm. Bring your favourite people – we’ll stay the course: bass ahead.

PHENOMENH: A Lunar Experience – September 20th, 2025
00:00 – 05:00 | 2 Dancefloors | Plan B, Malmö
Electronic Music All Night Long

“Like the moon’s phases, the night unfolds in shifting moods, from light to darkness, quiet to intensity - taking attendees through a dynamic emotional and sonic journey.”

After a moody spring and a warm, vibrant summer filled with both sunshine and rest, PHENOMENH returns this fall - more focused and ready than ever.

We’re finally back at Plan B for another night of immersive music, visuals, and a carefully curated lineup. No gimmicks, no glitter - just five hours of heavy-hitting, high-quality music.

Joining our local pillars of the scene, Eurowhip, DJ Klubb Kadaver, and our resident AELVA K, we’re proud to present two standout acts from beyond our borders:

BJØRNSON, based in Stuttgart, brings peak-time techno at its finest. His productions and remixes can now be found on essential labels such as KD raw, Tregambe and Hypnostate. Regularly supported and featured in the Drumcode Radio Show, as well as played live in clubs by acts like Richie Hawtin, Joris Voorn, Alex Stein, and Marco Faraone. His powerful, dark and pulsating sets have earned him recognition as one of Germany’s most promising new techno artists.

Wiebe Roose, Berlin-based Belgian artist, blends deep, psychedelic techno with emotional grooves and multicultural textures. Known for his signature trippy sound and his role as a teacher, producer, and promoter, Wiebe has become a driving force in Berlin’s underground and a master of deep dancefloor journeys.

Warehouse (00:00 – 05:00)

The ticket gives you full access to both the Warehouse and the Control Room. You will be able to enter Plan B at 23:00, and PHENOMENH starts at 00:00 sharp. The warehouse goes on until 05:00.

PHENOMENH isn’t just another party. It’s a space for the passionate—those who live for the music and the underground energy it creates. It’s simply a phenomenon, an event you have to experience to truly believe.

Spread the word, invite your friends, and join us for a night of unforgettable vibes. We’ll see you on the 20th of September!

Die Frida hat Geburtstag und feiert wild ein ganzes Wochenende auf drei Floors: wir öffnen zu diesem besonderen Anlass zum letzten Mal in diesem Jahr unser Pier sowie das Ober- und Unterdeck! Der Freitag steht dabei ganz im Zeichen von Techno und Trance. Zwei internationale Headliner mit Pleasurekraft und Karotte (der ein extra langes Fünfstundenset spielt!) beehren uns, während unsere vier Lieblingsmatrosen Bjørnson, Liroy, Leo Tiger und Crystal Crimez den perfekten Rahmen bilden - happy birthday!
—

It's Frida's birthday and we're celebrating wildly for a whole weekend on three floors: for this special occasion, we're opening our pier and the Oberdeck and Unterdeck for the last time this year! Friday is all about techno and trance. Two international headliners with Pleasurekraft and Karotte (who plays an extra-long five-hour set!) will honour us, while our four favourite matrons Bjørnson, Liroy, Leo Tiger and Crystal Crimez provide the perfect backdrop - happy birthday!

Hellooo, it's Anna Reusch time again! The female figurehead for groovy techno and pure energy is back on the cutter, ready for another escalation. Those who know, know! As last time, Anna will be accompanied by Bjørnson and Andre Keller.

The phenomenon Patrick Mason is in Stuttgart for the first time! Nobody in the techno scene dances so ecstatically and stylishly during his sets - no wonder, because Patrick was a professional dancer for years. He now lives this out during his DJ sets and delights hundreds of thousands of fans all over the world. His musical style is uncompromisingly straightforward, but always with the necessary touch of funk. We are delighted to have this top act for Frida! The support he's getting is just as great: DJ Leo Tiger for the opening and our resident Bjørnson for the closing.

A techno booking in a class of its own! None other than French DJ and producer Space 92 will be making his debut at Frida. With numerous releases on the best-known peak time techno labels such as Drumcode and groundbreaking sets, he has built up a reputation that has earned him almost 1 million monthly listeners on Spotify, among other things. Time to get our cutter rocking! Our resident Bjørnson is at his side and is responsible for both the opening and the closing.

50:HERTZ CLUB TRAIN presents: TAKE OFF Label Showcase by SPACE 92

On Saturday morning, the CLUB TRAIN will kick off with a powerful sunrise showcase hosted by one of the most influential names in the international techno scene: SPACE 92.

Techno Peak Time / Drive’s best-selling artist of all time, and the mind behind a string of number one hits, SPACE 92 is a trailblazing French producer. His sound identity is a mix of trancey techno, distorted percussion and a touch of acid, in addition to underlying sensitivity and nostalgia. SPACE 92 has released music on the world’s most influential labels: Drumcode, Filth on Acid, Factory 93, Arcane.

Founded in 2025 by SPACE 92, TAKEOFF is a young label that has consistently charted in the Beatport Top 3 since its inception, and is already ranked in the worldwide Techno Label Beatstats Top 20.

For this special ADE showcase, the label will take over one of the CLUB TRAIN stages with a full journey curated by SPACE 92 himself. This will be one of the most anticipated sets of the weekend.

SPACE 92“, the king of ”Peak-Time Techno", who has been the best-selling techno artist on Beatport since 2020 and still reigns at the top of the ranking, is coming to Japan for the first time under his own name. He will be the first solo artist to visit Japan! GREG DOWNEY will make his first visit to Japan in two years as a special guest.
SPACE 92 is a popular techno DJ/producer from France, whose style is characterized by energetic, trancey, and driving beats fused with acid and 80s sci-fi nostalgia.
He has released numerous co-productions and remixes with artists such as Maddix, Hardwell, Popof, UMEK, and HI-LO, and has headlined at major festivals and clubs such as ULTRA, EDC, Tomorrowland, TECHMISSION, LUMINOSITY He has headlined at major festivals and clubs such as ULTRA, EDC, Tomorrowland, TECHMISSION and LUMINOSITY.
He has visited Japan as a B2B unit “Turbulences” with Popof for ULTRA JAPAN 2022 “RESISTANCE Tokyo”, but this is the first time he has visited Japan under his own name.

GREG DOWNEY, owner of the Skullduggery label and a member of VII, will appear as a special guest.
He has been playing at festivals such as ASOT, FSOE Thailand, and LUMINOSITY as well as clubs around the world this year and continues to captivate audiences with his dense yet vibrant music that fuses techno and tech-trance.
The Asian tour has taken them to Hong Kong, Taipei, Taichung, and Osaka, and this show will be the last stop on the tour.

The internationally acclaimed Japanese techno duo DRUNKEN KONG and RYOHEI will support this show. Both will perform at ULTRA JAPAN 2025. Experience their overwhelming sound and energetic performance at one of the biggest clubs in Japan, ZEROTOKYO!

CODE 303 x UNDRGRND — Fourth Edition

This time, six artists take control of the floor:

- Alex Sharp
With deep basslines, smooth melodies, and a journey through genres, Alex Sharp delivers sets that are both soulful and floor-shaking — a true architect of the underground.

- Brizzia
Amsterdam’s Brizzia delivers raw, hypnotic techno colliding with deep melodic textures — high-energy sets built to move both body and mind.

- CØPTER
Utrecht’s CØPTER brings raw, driving beats and relentless hard techno energy — high-intensity power built for the underground floor.

Amsterdam-based Gaya Carmeli is rising fast with raw, high-energy sets that fuse acid, peak-time, and hard techno into pure underground fire.

Amsterdam’s Saskia Laval fuses her classical roots with fast, driving techno — delivering high-energy sets where raw power meets melodic connection on the floor.

- Semple
Dutch techno powerhouse SEMPLE delivers raw energy, deep basslines, and relentless rhythms — built to ignite the dancefloor from the very first beat.

This is more than a party — it’s the underground evolving, one night at a time. Join us for a night of connection, intensity, and pure CODE 303 energy.

Y do I known for their immersive live sets and finely crafted productions that blur the lines between genre, performance and storytelling, Y do I are Amos Chalfon and David Semo, a boundary pushing electronic duo who have quickly become one of the most compelling new voices in melodic techno. Blending elements of psytrance, progressive house, minimal and cinematic electronica, their sound is deeply emotional, spiritually charged and unmistakably original. 2024 marked a breakout year for the duo, with a milestone debut at Hï Ibiza for Afterlife and a critically acclaimed EP with Kevin de Vries, showcasing their talent for tension, texture and narrative through sound. That momentum carried into 2025 with a landmark performance at Afterlife Tulum and the upcoming release of “The End Of Genesys”, a powerful collaboration with

Anyma that premiered in the trailer for his Las Vegas Sphere residency. With a remix for Camelphat, ARTBAT & Rhodes also on the horizon this Summer, Y do I continue to evolve at a blistering pace; bridging underground flair with festival-scale impact. Their music exists in a space between body and mind, shadow and light, pushing melodic techno into bold, emotional and psychedelic new territory. Also featuring Soroush Heidari (with two top 10 tracks on Beatport), Raminem, and Mitch De Klein (a renowned Amsterdam artist with music on Beatport), alongside stunning visual effects and dancers, it’s going to be an unforgettable night!

Melodic Techno - Progressive house - Melodic House


Aphelion lands in Amsterdam for a once-in-a-lifetime event.

On August 30th, 2025, we take over The Other Side for an unforgettable night of cutting-edge sound, deep emotion, and pure energy – right in the beating heart of Amsterdam’s underground.

Over the years, Aphelion has welcomed a wide range of forward-thinking artists to its stage, including Stylo, Adam Sellouk, Rozyo, AMETHY, Eli & Dani, AVADDON, Quake, and Club De Combat and many more – each bringing their own signature sound and energy to the experience.

This upcoming edition will introduce a new lineup, carefully curated to reflect the next chapter in our journey – a fresh sonic direction that builds on our roots while reaching even further into the unknown.

Expect a powerful blend of melodic techno, groovy rhythms, progressive house, and deep melodic energy. A journey crafted to move both body and soul – from the first kick to the final note.

Aphelion is where we drift furthest from the known.
A moment suspended in space, where discovery begins.
A place where music becomes the force that guides us into the unknown.

BESWERDA (Dynamic, Afterlife)

Amsterdam’s melodic maestro, known for his hypnotic productions on Afterlife and Dynamic.
Beswerda delivers deep, groove rolling tension, moody atmospheres and precise rhythmic flow. Expect a captivating set that walks the line between introspection and euphoria.


Amethy ( Aphelion, Space Motion Records, Astral, ZAMNA)

One of the most talked-about rising names in the melodic techno scene.
With releases on Space Motion Records, asteral, and his own Aphelion imprint,
Amethy
crafts sonic journeys infused with emotion, groove and mystique. Supported by leading acts like Adriatique, Zamna, and Space Motion (with whom he also collaborated), Amethy's sound is both powerful and poetic a blend of depth, energy, and cosmic vision.


AVADDON (Aphelion, Siamese)

With a bold and melodic signature, AVADDON bring an energetic and unique edge to the lineup.
Signed to Siamese, the influential label by Adriatique, their productions merge groove-heavy techno with progressive fire. Their music is designed for impact - sharp, expressive, and unforgettable on the dancefloor.

Kitty Marroni
With a fresh and vibrant sound, Kitty Marroni is quickly becoming a name to watch in the melodic techno and progressive scene. Her sets blend deep grooves, hypnotic melodies, and energetic rhythms that light up the dancefloor and take the crowd on a journey.

Soroush
Soroush brings a driving, melodic energy to the decks, blending deep techno grooves with uplifting progressive sounds. His sets are crafted to build intensity emotions, keeping the crowd locked in from the first beat to the last.

Born as FuturFestival in 2009 to celebrate the centenary of the Futurism, Kappa FuturFestival evolved in 2012 as the leading summer outdoor dance music festival in Italy. Since 2014, it has consistently been counted among the top 10 European summer festivals and celebrated as a premier destination for festivalgoers worldwide.

In September 2019 it received the Best International Festival prize at the Ibiza DJ Awards. KFF is the only Italian festival featured in the "Festivals" guide which reviewed the 50 Best Music Festivals of all time. In 2024, Kappa FuturFestival was ranked as the 7th Best Festival in the World by DJ Mag.

CODE 303 x UNDRGRND — Fourth Edition

After three unforgettable nights, CODE 303 x UNDRGRND returns for its fourth chapter. Each edition has taken the underground deeper — pushing boundaries, raising energy, and building a community that lives for raw, unfiltered techno. On Oct 3, we do it again.

This time, six artists take control of the floor:

- Alex Sharp
With deep basslines, smooth melodies, and a journey through genres, Alex Sharp delivers sets that are both soulful and floor-shaking — a true architect of the underground.

- Brizzia
Amsterdam’s Brizzia delivers raw, hypnotic techno colliding with deep melodic textures — high-energy sets built to move both body and mind.

- CØPTER
Utrecht’s CØPTER brings raw, driving beats and relentless hard techno energy — high-intensity power built for the underground floor.

- Gaya Carmeli
Amsterdam-based Gaya Carmeli is rising fast with raw, high-energy sets that fuse acid, peak-time, and hard techno into pure underground fire.

- Saskia Laval
Amsterdam’s Saskia Laval fuses her classical roots with fast, driving techno — delivering high-energy sets where raw power meets melodic connection on the floor.

- Semple
Dutch techno powerhouse SEMPLE delivers raw energy, deep basslines, and relentless rhythms — built to ignite the dancefloor from the very first beat.

This is more than a party — it’s the underground evolving, one night at a time. Join us for a night of connection, intensity, and pure CODE 303 energy.

On October 26th, 2025, during the height of ADE in Amsterdam, Club John Doe will host an event destined to leave a lasting mark on the European techno scene. Endless, known for its immersive experiences and magnetic energy, joins forces with the sharp, visceral aesthetic of an artist who has transformed techno into a deeply personal language: Lino Fuso.

The night will unfold as a sonic journey that transcends the idea of a mere performance — a hypnotic progression through relentless rhythms, industrial soundscapes, and melodic tension, merging into a nocturnal ritual. No words can fully capture what will take place — only those present will truly understand.

In an atmosphere set to be both dense and intense, with strobe lights and evocative visuals, Club John Doe will become a place outside of time, where body and sound fuse into one.

𝟐𝟏 𝐌𝐀𝐑𝐒 ✧ 𝐏𝐌𝐔 𝐍𝐈𝐆𝐇𝐓𝐂𝐋𝐔𝐁 ✧ 𝐋𝐄 𝐌𝐀𝐙𝐄𝐓𝐓𝐄

Lancer le printemps dans un grand boum: Paris, on se donne rendez-vous le 𝟮𝟭 𝗺𝗮𝗿𝘀 pour une soirée qu’on avait très hâte de vous dévoiler !

Cette fois-ci, nous confions les reines du PMU à deux étoiles montantes de la high-energy dance music : ils ont remis sur le devant de la scène cette musique entre house et trance, taillée pour la rave et qui fleure bon les années 90s : l’inimitable Kyle Starkey et Miguel De Bois (aka Papi Banger) seront nos special guests. À leurs côtés Anastasia Zems, Engatson et SLTBQ mèneront la charge, parés de leurs plus beau grooves.

Faites vos jeux, fasten your seatbelt et PNC aux portes !

𝘀𝗲𝗲.𝘆𝗼𝘂.𝘁𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗲

Grishagreg, um rapaz radiante, de Moscovo para Lisboa desde os 22, é um entusiasta da música, colecionador de discos e tem um olhar apurado para descobertas raras na arte de escavar. Ultimamente tem-se focado em música brasileira e portuguesa; Zouk, música sul-africana, Disco e Downtempo enriquecem a paleta de um vasto percurso musical, proporcionando uma viagem essencial através da vida e do som.

Numa cidade distante, a humilde cantora Anastasia Zems descobriu a sua voz. Abraçando o seu espírito suave, criou música que ressoou com ouvintes de perto e de longe. Agora, florescendo em Lisboa, a alma criativa de Anastasia entrelaçou batidas eletrónicas com vocais suaves. Esta ligação natural, nascida de uma vida mergulhada em música, cativou o seu público através dos seus DJ sets e produções. Criada numa família modesta, Anastasia aperfeiçoou as suas habilidades em canto, dança e teatro. Na sua música, deixava-se guiar pelos instintos, criando paisagens sonoras que equilibravam ritmos telúricos com a energia vibrante da cidade. O seu espaço de trabalho minimalista servia de tela para a sua assinatura única de vocais instintivos, gravados à primeira. Entre os gigantes do seu género, Anastasia Zems partilhava a sua música genuína e poética com o mundo, um testemunho das suas raízes humildes.

Step into the shadows with PANTHERA, an immersive, uncharted experience set in a hidden industrial location in the heart of Lisbon’s east side.

Born from the vision of Madd Rod, PANTHERA promises a raw and unfiltered night of immersive sound and visuals. The lineup is a masterclass in talent, featuring electroclash pioneer The Hacker, Madd Rod, Anastasia Zems, Kemetic and Yizhaq.

The venue, a secret industrial space, amplifies the raw atmosphere, providing the perfect backdrop for a night of intense and authentic experiences. This isn't a polished club scene; it’s a return to the roots of electronic music, where the space, sound and lights merge into one.

Enhancing the auditory experience, SRAV (Sérgio Vieira) teams up with XTRA (José Nuno) to deliver immersive projections that bring the venue to life. Expect dystopic and futuristic visuals that challenge perception and blend with sound.
PANTHERA is designed as a safe space, standing firmly against any forms of discrimination, predatory or intimidating behaviour. It’s a community standing for creative freedom and self-expression, embracing the true essence of the underground, guided by values of respect and authenticity.

Details of the location remain a closely guarded secret, maintaining the enigmatic allure of PANTHERA. For the moment all that is known is the fact it is a big industrial location in the eastern side of the city.

ANASTASIA ZEMS
In a distant city, humble songstress Anastasia Zems discovered her voice. Embracing her gentle spirit, she created music that resonated with listeners far and wide.
Now flourishing in Lisbon, Anastasia's creative soul weaved electronic beats with soothing vocals. This natural connection, born from a life steeped in music, captivated her audience through her DJ sets and productions.
Raised in a modest family, Anastasia honed her skills in singing, dancing, and theater. In her music, she let instincts guide her, crafting soundscapes that balanced earthy rhythms with a vibrant city energy.
Her minimalist workspace served as the canvas for her unique signature of instinctual, first-take vocals. Amidst the giants of her genre, Anastasia Zems shared her genuine, poetic music with the world, a testament to her humble roots.

ELUSIVE Day & Night could not continue due to internal organisational issues. To make sure the night still carried on for the community, De Graanfabriek and Drafbaan joined forces to host an alternative event together. From 22:00 to 05:00 the doors were open at Graanfabriek with free entry, creating a last-minute underground gathering for everyone who had planned to attend the original show. The night featured local and resident talent across hard techno and rave energy, keeping the spirit of the scene alive despite the change of plans.

RAZJEB is a hard techno rave pushing new boundaries in Warsaw's underground scene, bringing together European artists who blend industrial influences, rave energy and experimental edge. NOZZ performed as one of the international headliners, delivering a high intensity set with guitar-driven rave expression. The night created a raw and immersive atmosphere for the Warsaw hard techno community.

C-Trullo hosted their winter opening night at Wood Clubroom bringing the local rave community together for a high energy hard techno gathering. NOZZ performed as the international guest headliner delivering his signature raw guitar-driven rave performance. The event marked NOZZ’s Italian debut and generated a powerful underground response in Lecce’s club scene.

AFTERD4RK returned to Subdeck for a Halloween rave takeover, transforming the venue with a 360° stage and intense, immersive lighting. NOZZ performed for the first time in Slovakia, delivering his signature hard techno guitar-driven set with high-impact crowd energy. The night brought together the local rave community for a dark and explosive club experience.

◤ INTRODUCTION

For the last four years, Techno am Wasser has been Vienna’s open-air destination for exceptional electronic grooves, located at one of the city’s best summer hotspots. Easily accessible by public transport, we return to the waterfront to start a new chapter, filled with deep hypnotic beats, open-air euphoria, and a community that truly lives for the music.

Last year’s energy was unmatched. Admission stops, unforgettable moments, and a dance floor that felt like home. For this season, we’re taking it even further. Expect a carefully curated lineup of forward-thinking artists, an intimate yet electrifying atmosphere, and the unique experience that defines these nights.

Grab your ticket now to secure your spot, and don't forget to spread the word to your friends. Let’s make this season unforgettable together.

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

◤ TICKETS

After multiple sold-out events with admission stops, we unfortunately had to turn away too many people, which we deeply regret. To prevent this and ensure smoother access for everyone, we are now shifting to a pre-sale system. The price reflects the average past donation, keeping it accessible while offering a more organized experience. No stress, no waiting, just pure music.

Techno am Beach is Vienna's ultimate free open air event, formerly known as Techno Picknick, now rebranded to bring you an even better experience. Where the city's vibrant electronic music scene meets the laid-back beach lifestyle.

Held at the Vienna City Beach Club, a large venue with plenty of space to dance, relax, or even swim in the Danube, this event brings together great music, good vibes, and a community that loves to unwind while feeling the sand between their toes.

With excellent food and drinks, including cocktails and shisha, you can enjoy an unforgettable day on the beach, all while soaking in the sun and later dancing under the stars.

Musically, Techno am Beach offers a unique experience. You can expect the finest local talent, showcasing the best that Vienna's electronic scene has to offer. But we're also giving a platform to the amazing newcomers, who deserve to be heard.

Our music starts off with smoother, house-inspired beats, with a touch of disco to set the mood. As the evening progresses, the energy intensifies, transitioning into pumping global techno sounds, keeping the atmosphere vibrant and energetic until the very last track.

Tell your friends and just come by – because the best part? The entrance is free!

It wouldn’t feel right to bring the TLF story to a close without Gary Beck. A long-standing part of our journey, he’s been one of our most trusted bookings — every appearance delivering pure carnage, sold-out crowds, and iconic dancefloor moments. Bringing him back for the final chapter was an easy choice.

Joining him is Fraz.ier — one of the UK’s fastest-rising techno powerhouses. His relentless sound has shaken dancefloors across the globe, from headline shows to major festivals. Known for high-energy sets, explosive drops, and warehouse-sized anthems, he’s the perfect artist to deliver a finale worthy of the TLF legacy.

Together as DRUM.ARCHIVE, they’ll unleash a night of uncompromising techno — a back-to-back journey through history and the future, from established legend to new generation trailblazer.

This is the last dance. The final time the TLF family takes over UNIT 51. Be part of it.

Tickets are already moving fast — once they’re gone, they’re gone.

Thank you to everyone who’s been part of the ride.
CDJ: 2x Pioneer CDJ-3000 (or CDJ-2000NXS2 depending on venue availability)
Monitor: Standard booth monitors (2x 12” active speakers minimum)

Description:
Summer's calling, and we're answering with a rave for the ages!

You loved our first day party at The Social, and now we're elevating the experience. Prepare for a huge summer rave in a truly unique original church-style setting, delivering nothing but pure, unadulterated sound from all vinyl courtesy of the 12'' of Wax series. This isn't just a party; it's a journey through sound.

We're incredibly excited to bring you legends who have graced the decks of iconic venues like Skank, Love Child, Joy, Drum, Pelican, Amadeus, and countless more. Get ready to immerse yourselves in the very best of two decades of dance music, spun entirely on vinyl.

But the magic doesn't stop indoors! We're expanding the experience with a dedicated outdoor area where DJs will be crafting those perfect summer vibes, leading into the main indoor event and continuing with an exclusive after-party.

The Musical Journey:

2 PM - 10 PM: Kicking off with a full rewind of House, Trance & Classics, setting the perfect daytime mood.
11 PM - 3 AM: As night falls, our residents will be stepping things up with an electrifying blend of House, Bounce & Classics to keep you moving till the early hours.
This event is set to be monumental and we anticipate it will sell out quickly. Secure your spot with our early bird tickets, available at our usual friendly price. For those who want to maximize the experience, grab an all-day band which grants you seamless entry and re-entry throughout the entire day and night!

Don't miss your chance to be part of summer's most anticipated vinyl rave!
Monitor: Standard booth monitors provided by venue

Description:
TLF’s iconic Rewind party returns — this time taking over The Social for a full May Day Daytime Rave. Expect sunshine, big nostalgia, and high-energy classics across two floors, delivering nonstop feel-good rave energy from 3 PM until 10 PM. Throwback tracks, hidden gems, and all the unforgettable anthems that defined the 90s & 00s.
Think drinks promos, street food vendors, live visuals, and a full day of pure community vibes.

Our first event of 2025 is something special. TLF teams up with Glasgow’s fast-rising brand PHG to bring Aberdeen two artists currently dominating the hard techno scene.

MELTX is one of Ireland’s most in-demand techno artists, having appeared at some of the biggest shows in the UK for Teletech, XXL and NRG in 2024. Known for her high-energy, industrial leaning sound, MELTX is set to deliver a performance Aberdeen has never experienced before.

Joining her is Remon Verhoeve, making his official UK debut double-header following standout sets at Verknipt, Rotterdam Rave, and major shows across Europe. After being featured in Beatport’s Top 10 Hard Techno Artists of 2024 with tracks like “I Wanna Feel” and his edit of “I Was Made For Lovin’ You”, Remon arrives with serious momentum.

Support from TLF & PHG residents across two rooms ensures a full night of relentless energy.

This event is expected to sell out. Early ticket purchase strongly advised.

Eternal returns with UK techno force Rudosa - A label boss, mentor, and artist with years in the game.

The event takes place at Meraki: a small, dark, and intimate venue that is perfect for fully immersing yourself. This event is for those who appreciate authentic techno and memorable nights. Doors close at 11:30 pm - be sure to arrive early.

Eternal has a strict zero-tolerance policy towards any form of abuse or harassment. We are committed to creating a safe and respectful environment for all attendees.

AISHA returned to Aberdeen with her signature fast-paced, high-energy techno and trance sound. Known for euphoric builds and heavy-weight dancefloor moments, AISHA has been lighting up clubs and festivals across the UK and beyond. Her last TLF show was a full roadblock with both rooms sold out, and this one followed the same trajectory with Early Bird already selling out before second release. A full-throttle rave in one of Aberdeen’s most established underground spaces.
PASystem: Full club PA provided by venue

Description:
TLF celebrates 12 years in the scene with a new generation of hard techno energy. You asked and they delivered, bringing two names currently making serious waves in the underground: Jason Cluff and CADZOW.

Backed by TLF’s new wave of residents, this birthday edition showcases the evolution of Aberdeen’s rave culture. Expect heavy kicks, intense atmosphere and a floor full of movement from open to close.

This one is set to be fast, loud and fully charged. TLF birthdays always sell out early so secure your spot.

TLF open a new run of headline shows with a massive double headliner. One of the most influential names in modern techno, Gary Beck, returns to The Tunnels. Known for his unmistakable energy and countless sold-out appearances, Gary has been a defining figure in the UK and international techno scene.

He’s joined by Harvey McKay, whose driving dark-techno sound and chart-topping releases have made him one of the industry's most respected performers. Expect intensity, atmosphere and a full dancefloor takeover.

This event has a history of selling out fast. Aberdeen, brace yourself.

TLF and RARE join forces once again to bring Scottish techno legends SLAM back to the mighty Tunnels.

Following two sell out shows across the last few years, SLAM return to Aberdeen just before a heavy festival run across Scotland and beyond. Expect a masterclass in driving, industrial and warehouse-ready techno from one of the most influential duos to ever shape the scene.

We are bringing the full TLF atmosphere. Low ceilings. Heavy energy. No holds barred.

Xenia is back by popular demand, after her recent sold out show hitting capacity early 2023 .
Shes ready to blow unit 51 roof off, this will hit capacity so don’t hang about .
Her style is Techno. Charm, musical taste, excellent technique and incredible ability to give dance energy to the audience.

Xenia's YouTube videos have reached millions of views. Owner of Numen Label Xenia is a great story of a breathtaking success gotten through the hard work and desire to overcome the difficult path of an artist-girl in the world of electronic music. Xenia was born in 1996 in a small village in the Ternopil region in western Ukraine, where she spent her childhood. From the age of 10 she tries to play musical instruments and in order to be able to learn to play the accordion she enters a music school in a neighbouring village. Twenty kilometres is exactly the length of the path that a little girl with a huge accordion case in her hands overcomes several times a week to prove to everyone once and for all that her life mission is music and she is ready to follow it to the end. In 2013, Xenia moved to the capital Kiev, where she entered the University of Technology and Design, but at the age of 18 she quit her studies plunging headlong into the Kiev nightlife and with a firm resolve to act on the other side of the DJ table. Having mastered the DJ techniques and made friends with the DJ gear Xenia began to play at small private events, in 2016 she made her debut on the Radio Intense streaming project - two video DJ mixes, each of which collected more than a million views, this was a turning point of her professional DJ career. Realising that it is necessary not only to play as a DJ, but also to release her musical ideas, Xenia builds a small home studio in 2018 and in the same year she plays for the first time in the legendary Kiev afterparty club Heaven. It was a love at first sight between the capital's nightlife community and Xenia, so she immediately became a resident of the club. Fame in Ukraine did not keep waiting long, and by the end of the year Xenia could boast of one of the most densely packed touring schedules, becoming the headliner of club events and large festivals in the homeland. Continuing to actively cooperate with Radio Intense, and regularly publishing her videos, Xenia becomes an increasingly visible and influential figure on the international electronic scene and releases her first tracks on Codex, Set About, IAMT, Stickrecrodings. The difficult pandemic years 2020 and 2021 for the music industry were not wasted - together with IAMT Music Group, Xenia opens her own label Numen, which in a fairly short time turns into a powerful techno brand and a real magnet for a large number of both young and experienced techno producers. She shoots several cool videos that only strengthen her status as the hottest and fastest growing techno diva, and also joins one of the world's best agencies - Analog, preparing to loudly declare herself in the near future and consolidate her position in the hearts of techno lovers from all over the world

After all the recent requests…. You asked for it and we delivered! One of the coolest women in techno today, we are buzzing to bring Juliet Fox to the granite city for our end of year closer

Juliet’s presence on the Techno scene cannot be ignored, her rise has been swift and relentless with countless production success alongside her increasing demand for DJ performances gracing some of the most famous stages and DJ booths across the globe.

ALT8 is coming to the Aberdeen!

TLF have secured yet another heavy hitter of the hard techno scene!!

Quickly becoming a launchpad for some of the scene’s brightest talents, Ireland is home to one of the Hard Techno movement’s most exciting prospects in the form of Alt8.

The hugely in demand DJ has been Inspired by DJ Rush, Chris Liebing, Klangkuenstler, Shlomo, Rebekah & Slam, Alt8’s broad knowledge of electronic music and diverse taste in different styles shine bright throughout his productions and gripping club performances.

His latest release, delivered as part of an upcoming VA on Kobosil’s R-Label, echoes Alt8’s innate ability to perpetuate his craft via his interpretation of some of the harder shades of Techno. The last 2 big bookings have sold out. Be quick and get your tickets before they are gone!

TLF 11th birthday and we are taking things up a notch! Over a year since we had Aisha at TLF and she’s gone from strength to strength ,she’s bringing all things hard and this night is going to be nuts 4am licence and 2 tunnels of whoppers from 10pm, tunnel 2 hosted by Aberdeen godfather of hard dance Alan Sadler with a night of hardhouse classics and a few local legends to boot . Producer from Glasgow, bringing fast paced, high energy Hard Dance to some of the best clubs and festivals in the UK. With releases on Glasgow’s revered Soma Records and a residency at the world renowned Sub Club, AISHA has cemented herself at the forefront of Scotland’s dense underground techno scene. Tracing her love of unrelenting, euphoric dance music to the UK Hardcore raves she used to go to, fast and energetic electronic music pumps through AISHA's veins and into her sets.

She has released on Soma Records, Taapion, Elements, Maison Close, Speedmaster and Obscuur Records, as well as winning Best Electronic at 2021’s Scottish Alternative Music Awards. Her track ‘Party 2nyt xx’ and collab track with Franck 'Schottland Slammer', have both received the title as Dancefloor Moment on Jaguar’s BBC Radio One show.

With sounds spanning from hard trance to raw, pumping techno, AISHA’s live sets are as versatile as they are incendiary, leading her to support names like Charlie Sparks and TRYM and play for the likes of Teletech and Possession.

As a recent resident for Animal Farm, one of Glasgow longest running club nights, AISHA has become an integral part of the Scottish electronic scene while firmly establishing herself as one to watch with her heavyweight productions and energy soaked sets.

With an already burgeoning gig diary and upcoming releases on some of Europe’s finest record labels, she is poised to take on the world’s dancefloors.

When AISHA is playing, prepare to sweat.

After the unreal response to azyr selling out in 5 days, we thought we would keep rolling with the heavy hitters !

Another man that’s selling out venues over and over, excited to welcome Basswell to the city for a huge sellout party at unit 51!!

A hardtechno enthusiast, Basswell has a powerful and assertive style, mixing fast / hard and rave style.

Supported by the leaders of the undeground scene such as Amelie Lens, Shlømo or Kobosil Basswell has been settling on the scene for several months through bookings in Europe and abroad.

A talented and prolific producer, his tracks such as 'Bass Down Low', 'Around' and 'Hear the sound' have already been played by some of the biggest names and his innovative and constantly evolving style is appreciated by labels such as Exhale or Color.

Slam are a tour de force on the global techno circuit. Their unique, 6 deck, back-to-back DJ performances have seen the duo play leading clubs & festivals across the world. They are renowned for both their experience and their powerful, contemporary sound.

Catch them for an intimate set in the Tunnels before they hit every major festival in the Scottish Calendar.

D.A.V.E The Drummer @ The Tunnels


Had this under wraps for some time !!

We are delighted to announce our final guest of 2022, a man that’s no stranger to the harder, faster side of techno.

Dave is massively respected in the techno scene, With decades of experience his kept his finger on the pulse.

This man has stood the test of time, still playing regular globally and flying the flag for the acid techno scene.

If you are into Techno Music, you may have already come across one of D.A.V.E. The Drummer’s records.

Hailing from London’s illegal warehouse party scene that exploded in the 90’s, DJ & producer D.A.V.E. The Drummer started the label Hydraulix in 1998 as an output for his own production ideas.

The label intended to bridge the gap between the acid techno of his previous productions and a darker style of techno that D.A.V.E. was experimenting with in the studio.

Hydraulix made some big waves in the Hard Techno scene throughout the 2000’s and is still going strong with many of the new releases hitting the top spots in the Beatport Charts.
Tracks from Hydraulix have found their way into the playlists of some of the worlds top DJs as well as keeping a huge following of underground Techno DJs across the globe.

D.A.V.E’s recent music reflects a shift toward a darker stripped back techno sound and the label is still at the forefront of the techno scene winning respect from many DJs and taking on board fresh young artists as well as releasing tracks by seasoned Hydraulix regulars.
Still a hard working DJ and Producer, D.A.V.E. The Drummer is responsible for remixes and productions for many great techno labels including Fine Audio, Noom, Reklusive, Naked Lunch, Phobiq, Elektrax, Techburst and of course Hydraulix, Apex and Mutate To Survive.

Supporting DJ’s include:
Amelie Lens, Charlotte De Witte, Nina Kraviz, Rebekah, Dax J, Perc, Andreas Kraemer, Sven Wittekind, Dense & Pika, Adam Beyer, Dave Clark, Carl Cox, Chris Liberator, A.Paul, Lukas Friere, The Advent, Christian Varela, Pet Duo & Resistohr, Fernanda Martins & She Fit, Darmec, Axel Karakasis, DJ Murphy, Wehbba, Joseph Capriati, Mike Humphries, Ritchie Hawtin, Space DJz, Eric Sneo, Mark EG, Lenny Dee, Diarmead O’Meara, Sasha Carassi, Axel Karakasis & more…

New for 2025, MEDUZA & JAMES HYPE PRESENT OUR HOUSE builds on the success of their three-year Club Room residency, to create an enhanced and upgraded show for the Hï Ibiza Theatre.

This year, the experience levels up with MEDUZA³, a groundbreaking new hybrid live show, fusing DJing, live piano, cutting-edge MIDI controls, and spontaneous performance energy.

The relentless innovation continues as James Hype debuts his explosive new visual performance, SYNC. Hype’s actions on the decks will seamlessly synchronise with an array of light cues on the LED booth to showcase his next-level technical skills, high-intensity energy like never before.

CLUB ROOM
High octane rave energy is in full effect in the Club Room, as Hannah Laing begins a new era of female residents at Hï Ibiza. The Scottish DJ and producer has had a meteoric rise in recent years and her dancefloor-focused, uptempo sound is the perfect match for the Club Room’s underground vibe and raw intensity.

Our city centre rave space just got a big upgrade and our lineups are getting the same treatment.

We're PSYCHED to announce that the prolific producer and absolute pillar of the Manchester techno scene RUDOSA will be headlining our next party on May 16th with a two hour set.

A true heavyweight in the global techno movement, Rudosa has produced tracks with some of the biggest names in the game: Sara Landry, Chlär, Beau Didier, Obscure Shape and Cleric to name just a few.

His discography is stacked with releases on powerhouse labels Soma, Exhale and We Are The Brave. Millions of Spotify streams later and having play clubs and festivals all over the world, his own label Moments In Time continues to pump out huge tunes from the likes of Alex Farell, Alt8 and Hadone.

Expect a set that’s high-impact, emotionally charged and laser-focused on the dance floor. Fusing 90s and early 2000s influences with tribal percussion and hypnotic grooves, Rudosa’s sound is tailor-made for late-night chaos

-----

Sheffields own KUDAN joins us fresh from supporting Blawan at Forge a few weeks back. He's appeared at some of Sheffield finest underground parties like Steel Dancin, INTERZONE and Factor 50. Known for his razor-sharp selections and a style that weaves together gritty, hypnotic techno with moments of pure euphoria, Kudan brings a raw, no-frills energy to every set and this will be no exception!

CIMMERIAN and PUT IT IN H! lay down some melodic house and techno in the downstairs bar & beer garden to warm us up

With the community still reeling from the loss of Hope Works (RIP) we want to put Panke Social on the map as a bolthole for the electronic music community in Sheffield.

To that end we're kicking the night off as a social, opening the downstairs bar and beer garden at 10pm with our residents warming up with some melodic house, techno and breakbeat.

At midnight we increase the intensity, heading to the rave cave upstairs on a biiiiig Martin Audio sound system to shake the place 'till 5am

SYNOID's sound is inspired by and rooted in the raw, industrial corner of Berlin's underground techno scene and combines fast, driving and hard beats with influences from acid, EBM (electronic body music), rave and trance. Intense, raw, dark, pulsating, pumping and uncompromising - a soundscape that reflects the spirit of the city: urban, industrial, dystopian and yet driven by energy, hope and joy.

One of its most outstanding features is the creation of long, continuous events that allow participants to immerse themselves in an emerging parallel cultural society and break free from everyday norms and constraints. These extended experiences have become a signature of SYNOID and embody the commitment to creating lasting socio-cultural memories.

Join the Techno Revolution at ADE: Codex and Union Three Return to Club Up.

Prepare yourself for an unparalleled techno experience as the Amsterdam Dance Event (ADE) brings another night of pulsating rhythms and captivating vibes. This year, the iconic Club Up transforms into the heartbeat of the techno world, hosting a spectacular evening that promises to be nothing short of legendary. Codex and Union Three, two powerhouse labels in the techno scene, unite once again to create a sonic journey that will leave you breathless.

Leading this electrifying expedition are none other than Spartaque and Ramiro Lopez. Watch in awe as these two techno titans perform back-to-back sets, blending their unique styles to craft an unforgettable musical experience. Their synergy on stage is set to create an atmosphere that transcends the ordinary, pushing the boundaries of sound and energy.

But the magic doesn’t end there. Joining them is a stellar lineup of techno’s finest, including Leo Force, Gonçalo, Rudosa, Nakadia, Cristian Varela, Anna Tur, Joris Turenhout, Martin K4rma, Klaudia Gawlas, and Bruce Zalcer. These maestros will ensure the beats keep flowing and the energy remains sky-high throughout the night, making this event an unmissable highlight of ADE.

This isn’t just an event; it’s a celebration of connection, unity, and the shared passion of hundreds of techno enthusiasts moving to the same relentless beat. Whether you’re a seasoned raver or new to the techno scene, this night promises to be a defining moment. Be part of a musical odyssey that will be etched in the history of ADE.

Secure your tickets, lace up your dancing shoes, and allow the beats of Codex and Union Three to lead you through an evening of unrivaled techno euphoria. Amsterdam and Club Up are calling. Will you answer?

Creamfields has blazed the trail for electronic dance events over the last 25+ years and cemented its position as one of the world's leading music festivals. Born in 1998, Cream set out to provide the clubbing world with a bespoke largescale outdoor event putting DJ's centre stage for the first time, its flagship UK festival held in Cheshire in the north of England has grown from a 25,000 capacity one day show to the four-day camping behemoth it is today attracting sell out audiences of 70,000 every August Bank Holiday weekend. In addition, the festival stages events around the world throughout the year.

The multi award winning multistage festival is renowned for delivering unbeatable line-ups featuring over 300 of the world's biggest electronic artists . With ground-breaking staging, jaw dropping production, and the festivals unique electric atmosphere all key ingredients to its success, and the reason it continues to attract dance music fans from around the world year after year and remains one of the most hotly anticipated music festivals on the planet. 2024 will be no exception as the UK's one and only edition returns to the fields of Cheshire from 22nd – 25th August.

We are super excited to team up with the TURBO label to welcome the DJ & producer duo from Budapest, NoNameLeft, who have made a big impact on modern peaktime Techno with their productions. Gizmo takes over for the closing, delivering a journey somewhere between peaktime Techno and minimal influences.
Meanwhile, at the Bar, Don will play an all-nighter full of groove and vibes, with a sound infused with minimal and tech house.

➟ NoNameLeft · Budapest, Hungary
Divergent | Iboga | Truesoul | Senso

Producer/DJ duo from Budapest, Hungary. Two friends with deep knowledge in various DAWs and musical instruments teamed up as NoNameLeft to share their common visions in sound with more and more people.

Their versatility surfaces in cosmic techno, melodic techno with additional minimal and progressive elements.

They climbed to the top tiers of the techno charts with many of their productions, some were played and supported by the finest artists around, such as Enrico Sangiuliano, Oliver Heldens aka HI-LO, Layton Giordani, Township Rebellion, Wehbba, Deadmau5 aka testpilot, UMEK to name only a few.


➟ CALYPSIS · Berlin, Germany
Ritter Butzke Residents

Hola! We are Nicole and Liz, two best friends from Mexico whose musical journey began as a quest for spiritual expression; a desire to heal with the power of music.

We combine our passion for music as a spiritual and joyful expression. For us, sound is a universal language - one that allows us to connect deeply, celebrate life, and raise collective energy.

Our sets invite you into a mystical dance experience where the sacred meets the playful. We don’t follow a script - we follow the vibe. Each performance is a ritual, shaped by the energy of the crowd. Whether it’s sunrise in nature or midnight in a warehouse, our goal is always the same: to create a space where people can feel, release, and reconnect through music.

Described as Desert House and Techno, our sound is deeply inspired by the mysticism of Oriental music and the raw, electric pulse of Berlin’s underground scene. We flow intuitively between earthy, organic deep sounds and the darker, more hypnotic rhythms of melodic techno and progressive - always guided by the energy in the room.

There’s a duality in everything we do: light and shadow, softness and strength, ritual and play. It’s within that balance that we create immersive experiences on the dancefloor.


➟ STEFAN MUELLER · Bamberg/Berlin/FFM, Germany

For over four years, Stefan Mueller has been creating unforgettable nights in the clubs of the German techno scene. His sound moves between melodic techno and driving, progressive beats - always aiming to transform the dance floor into an energetic atmosphere.

At PRACHT in Frankfurt, his musical home, he has the freedom to express himself fully and continually captivates his audience with a diverse range of sounds.

However, he hasn’t just got people dancing in Frankfurt - he has also energized crowds in Berlin’s Ritter Butzke, Renate, and in the Rakete in Nürnberg, as well as in numerous other clubs, delivering ecstatic moments with his sets.

Get ready for the next chapter of Spectral! We‘re beyond excited to present NoNameLeft (Divergent, HU) as our headliner.

NoNameLeft is a techno duo from Budapest that quickly became a key name in the international peaktime techno scene. Their breakthrough came in 2021 with Dyson Sphere, supported by top acts like Enrico Sangiuliano, deadmau5, and Oliver Heldens. They led the Peaktime Hype artist charts for 19 months and peaked at on the Peaktime Main chart, ahead of artists like Charlotte de Witte and Lilly Palmer.

Their powerful and versatile sound spans peaktime techno, melodic and minimal techno, and progressive house. They’ve released on major labels like Truesoul, Senso Sounds, 1605, and Heldeep, and in 2024, launched their own label “Divergent” with Mateo!. With performances in over 10 countries and continued support from big names, NoNameLeft is firmly positioned at the forefront of modern techno.

Liebe Leute, wir kommen zusammen zu einem Tag unter freiem Himmel und klären wieder mit Zahlreichen Redebeiträgen zu Berlins Club- & Kulturentwicklung auf.
￼
Redebeiträge & Thema der Kundgebung:
Kultur ist kein Luxus – sie ist Lebensgrundlage! Wir möchten uns engagieren für den Erhalt der Berliner Club- und Festivalkultur. Berlin steht für Offenheit, Kreativität und Vielfalt – nirgendwo zeigt sich das so lebendig wie in der Club- und Festivalkultur.

Doch diese einzigartige Szene ist bedroht: durch Verdrängung, steigende Mieten, politische Untätigkeit und wirtschaftliche Unsicherheit.

Festival Lighting Concept | 4 Floors | 22 DJs | Techno, Trance, Hard Techno, DnB

and most importantly - a living room atmosphere <3

WohnzimmerTechno = living room techno (English)

And that’s exactly the vibe we are creating at our events. We want everyone to feel comfortable, welcome and supplied with the most amazing artists of the scene.

There is a consistently rising hate between the different genres of electronic music which we want to stop because it has nothing to do with the ORIGIN OF TECHNO.

We’re here to lift each other up and create a night that will stay in our minds forever.

To guarantee this will be the night of your life we don’t just have a fantastic Techno, Hard Techno & DnB Line Up.

In Cooperation with D&F we planned a complete new and unique lighting concept ONLY FOR THIS NIGHT AT VOID HALL. The software has already been programmed and additional light system will be installed the day before. See teasers on our Insta. ITS GONNA BE MINDBLOWING!

We’re really looking forward to creating this unique and loving atmosphere and can’t wait to see many new and familiar faces.

For us it’s very important that everyone is accepted - so THERES ABSOLUTELY no place discrimination, homophobia, transphobia or any other unacceptable behavior. Our team with the WzT Shirts will be available at any time and can be consulted if someone is not feeling well or harassed.

NoNameLeft have been captivating us for years with their powerful tracks, which have already found their way onto top international labels like Truesoul, Senso Sounds, and Set About. 

We’re thrilled to welcome them not only for a set at Elipamanoke but also for a new release on KOSMOS. Their compelling collaboration with the newly-formed duo Moto Moto, titled Voices of Caladan, will make its debut at Elipamanoke.

The record also features a remarkable remix by Lautaro Ibañez, who will be joining us for the release party as well!  

Also joining are Sinah from Weimar, Elipanaoke resident Aio, and KOSMOS co-founder Aender.  

Get ready for the finest Space Techno, cosmic visuals, and KOSMOS Merch at the Eli Bar!

Das Techno-Duo NoNameLeft hat sich zu einem exklusiven Namen in der internationalen Techno-Szene entwickelt. Ihr erster Erfolg war "Dyson Sphere" im Jahr 2021, ein Track, der von Größen wie Enrico Sangiuliano, Oliver Heldens, Deadmau5 und Layton Giordani gespielt wurde.
Der Erfolg ihres Sounds und ihrer Veröffentlichungen brachte sie auf Tournee rund um den Globus, wobei sie in über 10 verschiedenen Ländern auftraten, einschließlich Australien, Südafrika, Saudi-Arabien, Türkei, Norwegen, Finnland und Portugal.
Das Produzenten-/DJ-Duo aus Budapest, Ungarn zeigt ihre Vielseitigkeit in kraftvollem & melodischem Techno. Wir freuen uns auf eine wilde treibende Nacht.

Prepare for a night of techno transcendence as Pure Black Records proudly presents "Lunar New Year Celebration" at Kafé Koma in Helsinki, featuring none other than the illustrious techno duo, NoNameLeft!
Hailing from Budapest, Hungary, NoNameLeft has etched their name as a force in the international peaktime techno scene. Their track "Dyson Sphere" set the stage for a meteoric rise, catching the ears of heavyweights like Enrico Sangiuliano, Oliver Heldens, deadmau5, and Layton Giordani.
No strangers to the charts, they led the Peaktime Hype artist charts for a staggering 19 months, securing the 5th spot on the Peaktime Main artist chart, surpassing luminaries like Charlotte de Witte and Lilly Palmer.
Their global journey has taken them to over 10 different countries, leaving an indelible mark on dance floors from Australia to South Africa, Saudi Arabia to Finland.
The pinnacle of 2023 saw NoNameLeft collaborate with Township Rebellion on Drumcode sublabel, Truesoul, cementing their position as techno trailblazers.
With releases on labels such as Senso Sounds, Heldeep /HILOMATIK, Scander/Legend, and 1605, their versatile sound spans powerful techno, melodic techno, deep/minimal techno, and progressive house.

After the buzz of our Sober Festival and the success of our coffee rave pilot, we’re turning it up for the TSC Amsterdam Marathon edition — the perfect warm-up for Amsterdam’s cold, rainy October mornings.

The Sober Morning Coffee Rave is back — marathon style.
We kick things off with our Shake-Up Run, a guided warm-up led by a pro athlete to sharpen your pace, share performance tips, and get your body moving. From there, it’s straight into 3 hours of house beats, coffee highs, and riverside vibes at VESSEL.

​Think sunrise dance floor, curated DJ sets, and a community of marathoners, wellness lovers, and party people who don’t need alcohol to bring the energy instead a cup of coffee is enough.

​Whether you’re running the next day or just here to celebrate, this is your chance to fuel up, connect, and keep the adrenaline flowing — all before noon.

​Good music. Strong coffee. Pure vibes.
Bring your sneakers, your friends, and your best energy — we’ll handle the rest.

Resonate is a trance-focused club night bringing together local favourites for a high-energy journey through classic trance anthems. Lukas performed alongside Winstan, Matt Gurd, and Craig Quemard, contributing to a nostalgic and uplifting night characterised by melodic builds and driving rhythms. The event was hosted at ROJO in Jersey and has become one of the island’s core gatherings for trance lovers.

Lucuz performed an all-night back-to-back set with Quemard for The Mary Rose’s Bank Holiday Special. The event offered a progressive, trance and techno journey and showcased the duo’s ability to build long-form storytelling sets. Their extended performance held the energy from start to finish, with strong crowd engagement throughout the night.

Lucuz performed aboard the Resonate Trance Classics Boat Party, a special sunset edition sailing across Jersey’s coastline. The event showcased uplifting trance classics in an intimate open-air setting with Matt Gurd and Craig Quemard completing the lineup. With a fully sold-out boat and a warm, nostalgic atmosphere on the water, this event highlighted Lucuz’s ability to deliver energetic, emotionally charged sets in unique locations.

Resonate returned with another trance-driven night dedicated to classic anthems and euphoric energy. Featuring a special producer set from Lukas alongside Matt Gurd and Craig Quemard, the event delivered four hours of high-energy uplifting trance, progressive influences, and nostalgic rave elements. The night continued the signature Resonate atmosphere, bringing together a passionate community of trance lovers for an intimate yet powerful club experience.

Resonate’s March edition delivered a high-energy Trance Classics experience featuring some of Jersey’s favourite selectors. Lucuz performed alongside Lukas, Winstan, and Craig Quemard for a night dedicated to iconic trance anthems, emotional builds, and nostalgic crowd moments.

A high-energy techno night hosted by ORƎA, Skollaris and Mia Mao. The event featured a 360-degree stage setup with the DJ in the centre, creating a fully immersive environment where the crowd surrounded the performance area. The night showcased four unique techno universes under one direction: uncompromised, raw techno energy.

Artists on Lineup
• Ueberrest

• Skollaris
• Reege

Performance Notes for Skollaris
Skollaris delivered one of the night’s defining hard-techno sets, contributing to the event’s deep, driving atmosphere. The immersive stage design amplified crowd engagement and highlighted his ability to perform in high-intensity environments.

Rejoins-nous pour célébrer le premier anniversaire du collectif Nantais BEWONDER !
Pour revenir à l'origine, c'était lors d'une virée Parisienne à une des soirées ORKA, organisé par SKØLLARIS à Paris, avec Lampé (Alula Tunes) en tête d'affiche, que nous nous sommes rendu compte de l'évidence de créer ce collectif BEWONDER, tant nous étions basé sur des vibes similaires entre Dark Minimal Techno, Psy Techno et Techno Progressive entre autres..
C'est ainsi que nous avons crée le collectif BEWONDER, et avons par la suite élargit le collectif en accueillant de nouveaux membres et amis (Jocan Deka, Pink Empire & Marge), et également élargit notre spectre musicale des soirées GROOVINC aux soirées COSMOS, Groovin Carpet & Psychedelic Gathering.
Quoi de plus logique donc que d'inviter SKØLLARIS à venir entamer notre 2nde année de la meilleure des manières !
Avec au programme également le crew dans sa formule initiale : Tadhana, Nutskey, Madken & Chakruy !
La soirée risque d'être piquante à souhait !
On vous en dit plus très vite sur notre invité !

ROBIN HASTINGS is a Chilean Hard Techno DJ and producer who focuses on making the dancefloor move. With his technical skill learned at Point Blank Music School, pure selection as a DJ, attention to high-end sound production and the integration of a drum machine connected to the mixer, he creates a high energy, very danceable and unique DJ set. Playing at esteemed venues in Chile, Netherlands and Germany, as well as sharing stage with renowned artists, Robin sets a difference when he performs, introducing his own sound. Robin's versatility extends beyond DJing, as evidenced by his releases on notable labels including Systolic Records, Etom Records, Back in Black Recordings, Red Moon,and Invert Records. Robin's distinctive sound draws inspiration from the aesthetics of rave culture, seamlessly blending various styles like PSY-Techno, Industrial Techno, and Hard Techno. When experiencing a Robin Hastings set,audiences are taken on a journey reminiscent of the euphoric sounds of the '90s Rave era. Expect an immersive sonic experience characterized by intense, dark tones, industrial drums, and a tempo ranging from 150 to 160 bpm—a homage to the authentic roots of the genre.

HANNES KNEF is a new generation Harder Techno producer, experimenting with fresh club focused techno sounds. His music is meant to feel engaging and familiar to a wider audience of listeners. The main vision is to make people enjoy the music of the future, rather than showing what techno could be within the underground scene.
Released on labels as Whalien Records, H33, Mass etc.

ALEX SHARP

His musical VERSATILITY makes is easy to adapt to any line up without compromising his unique style. get ready to explore hard groove like never before. Behind the scenes alex is running the undrgrnd project and no sundays without techno.

BRIZZIA
delivers raw, hypnotic techno where driving power meets deep melodic textures. She’s rocked top events across Spain and the Netherlands alongside Lilly Palmer and Marco Faraone, and builds immersive AV shows—pulsing beats with atmospheric drone visuals—grounded in training at Madrid’s leading academies.

SASHE
represents a new generation of electronic music, blending hard house, hard trance and touches of euro trance into a high-energy, euphoric journey
With carefully crafted builds and euphoric peaks, she takes the crowd on a journey, creating moments where the music takes over and the dance floor moves as one.

DAVID PHOENIX is the alias of Hungarian DJ/producer David Janecska, whose two-decade career spans breakbeat, techno, and Drum & Bass. Returning to production in 2017, he fused techno with neuro and psy influences to craft sleek, minimal grooves built for the dancefloor. Since his 2020 debut EP Cybercrime, he’s become a fast-rising name in minimal techno, releasing on top labels like Iboga Records and Set About, charting on Beatport, and performing worldwide. In 2023, he launched his own imprint, VISION SERPENT, pushing forward minimal and psytech sounds.

Voted one of the top DJs nationally (Fazemag), Herbrido has made a name for himself in the techno scene. Countless national appearances at various clubs and festivals, as well as international appearances in cities such as Los Angeles and Istanbul, speak for his unique performance. The varied mix in his DJ sets creates an extraordinary atmosphere that captivates the audience on the dance floor from minute 1. His own productions have already been heard millions of times worldwide and are always in the top 100 of the Beatport charts. It is not without reason that a DJ great like Amelie Lens played his track “Darkness” in her Tomorrowland Live Mix. Watch out for Herbrido!

Vision Serpent Records comes to Budapest with label founder David Phoenix and fellow Vienna-based artist Nya Nyx. Founded in 2023, Vision Serpent opens a portal to uncharted sonic realms, uniting the worlds of techno and psytech.

DAVID PHOENIX is a Hungarian-born producer and DJ who has been shaping electronic music for over two decades. His productions on Iboga Records, Set About, Alula Tunes, and more have climbed the Beatport Top 100, and his sets have lit up dancefloors from Europe to Mexico, India, and beyond. Expect sleek, steady, and driving grooves, where the precision of minimal techno meets the mind-bending sound design of psy.

NYA NYX is a standout talent from Vienna whose psytechno style blends dark, minimal, and progressive techno with hypnotic basslines, rolling grooves, and lush psychedelic soundscapes. Behind the decks since 2017, she crafts immersive sets that keep the dancefloor moving from the first beat to the last.

We are also excited to feature one of our favourite artists from the Hungarian scene, Zvezda Beta, who has been curating music for nearly 30 years and never ceases to amaze us. Hansey will be joining us as well, representing the next generation of rising talent. Of course, we can't forget our two hosts, Cheeky and Gabriel Lehr, whose birthday we are celebrating this evening.

We are trying out a new venue, which we found to be outstanding during our tour. We eagerly anticipate a truly fantastic evening and invite you to embark on a journey through an entirely new world.
