La Sierra Songwriting Retreats at La Sierra Casa is a multi‑day creative residency in the mountains of Spain, designed for artists who want to deeply focus on their songwriting craft. Across several days, a small group of writers live and work together at the La Sierra Casa retreat, collaborating in writing rooms, receiving guidance from guest mentors, and developing songs in a relaxed but highly productive environment.

This edition is led by acclaimed songwriter Ryan Lawrie, whose work with major artists has surpassed 2.2 billion streams, alongside David and an additional special guest writer/producer, bringing high‑level industry experience directly into the sessions. Participants are encouraged to experiment, co‑write and refine ideas while surrounded by the quiet, scenic hills of Southeast Spain, with limited places to keep the atmosphere intimate and focused. The retreat is ideal for emerging and established writers looking to strengthen their catalogue, build meaningful collaborations and gain real‑world insight into modern songwriting practice.

Jack David makes his debut under his new project with a high‑energy DJ set at Amsterdam’s iconic Hotel Arena during Amsterdam Dance Event, sharing the bill with dance heavyweights Laidback Luke, Bassjackers, Martin Jensen, Sam Feldt and more. As part of a packed ADE showcase night, he delivers a modern, melodic dance set tailored for a main‑room festival‑club atmosphere, bringing his own sound into a lineup of established international names.

Framed as a milestone “first show” for the Jack David project, the event marks his entrance onto a major industry stage, supported by the Heartfeldt and 88 Music Management camp and set against the backdrop of one of the world’s leading electronic music conferences.

Jack David brings his high‑energy DJ sound to 125 Live!, a two‑day multi‑stage celebration taking over Mill Street and the surrounding Perth Theatre & Concert Hall venues in Perth, Scotland. Across four stages and multiple buildings, the event blends cutting‑edge live music, DJs and immersive visual art, with Jack performing alongside acts such as Walt Disco, Valtos, Parliamo, Ross Ainslie and more.
​
Set in the heart of the city and drawing a large crowd across the 6–7 September weekend, 125 Live! positions Jack within a diverse, festival‑style lineup, showcasing his electronic club sound in a setting that bridges live performance, DJ culture and contemporary visual production

RYFT presents HYPERSPACE, a techno-focused night where sound, space, and visual art come together. Immersive artworks are integrated into the dancefloor environment, shaping the atmosphere through light, movement, and rhythm. The event takes place at The River, a secure venue with safe private parking in a safe area. On-site security will be present throughout the night, with security searches upon entry.


﻿Lineup: DREW Lahvarsen Aeska Kolbe Jutbok

RYFT is committed to safe and healthy raving. No racism. No homophobia. No sexism. No hate of any kind. Respect the space, respect each other, and respect the music.

A STATEMENT FROM THE TEMPLE

THE RITUAL OF RESPECT


THE STRENGTH OF OUR SCENE HAS ALWAYS COME FROM THE PEOPLE WHO FEEL SAFE ENOUGH TO LOSE THEMSELVES IN THE SOUND. THE TEMPLE WAS FOUNDED TO BE A SANCTUARY OF HARD & INDUSTRIAL TECHNO, AND THERE IS NO SANCTUARY WITHOUT SAFETY, ACCOUNTABILITY, AND RESPECT.


IN LIGHT OF RECENT EVENTS SURFACING WITHIN THE GLOBAL TECHNO COMMUNITY, WE FEEL IT IS TIME TO TURN THE VOLUME DOWN ON THE NOISE AND UP ON THE VOICES THAT TRULY DRIVE THE UNDERGROUND FORWARD. TO HONOR THE WOMEN WHO BUILT THIS CULTURE AND THE RAVERS WHO KEEP IT ALIVE, OUR NEXT GATHERING WILL FEATURE A 100% FEMALE LINEUP.

THIS IS MORE THAN A BOOKING CHOICE; IT IS A COMMITMENT TO THE STANDARDS WE EXPECT IN OUR SPACE. WE ARE RETURNING TO THE ROOTS OF TECHNO-A RITUAL FOR EVERYONE, PROTECTED BY ALL.


RESPECT THE COMMUNITY. PROTECT THE RAVE. SAFE DANCEFLOORS FOR ALL.

Deep Horizon is an immersive dockside deep house experience aboard the stunning MS Bjørvika, moored at the heart of Oslo’s waterfront. Step aboard for an evening where sound and setting merge – deep, flowing rhythms under open skies and shimmering city lights.

Expect a journey through soulful, melodic house curated by top local and guest DJ – Keleo, creator of DEEP HORIZON from Belgium/UK. Powerful sound, and a warm, connected crowd. Though the ship stays at port, the atmosphere will drift far beyond the horizon.

Doors Open: 22.00

Dress to move. Arrive with good energy.
